name: Julia Margaret Cameron
shortBioZh: 英国摄影先驱 Julia Margaret Cameron（1815–1879）以柔焦、近距离肖像、文学与宗教寓言式摆拍著称。她在48岁左右开始摄影，将当时常被视为技术媒介的摄影推进为具有艺术表达力的肖像实践。
shortBioEn: A British pioneer of photography, Cameron used soft focus, close portraiture, and literary or allegorical staging to argue for photography as an expressive art form.
imageCredit: 用户上传图片 / User-provided profile image

name: Mary Wollstonecraft
keyWorks: 《女权辩护 / A Vindication of the Rights of Woman》（1792）
《男权辩护 / A Vindication of the Rights of Men》（1790）
《玛丽：一部小说 / Mary: A Fiction》（1788）
《瑞典、挪威和丹麦书简 / Letters Written During a Short Residence in Sweden, Norway, and Denmark》（1796）
shortBioZh: 早期女性权利思想文本，强调女性理性、教育权与公民身份。
shortBioEn: A foundational text of early feminist political thought, linking women’s reason, education, and citizenship.
theoryFramework:
focus: 理性教育、公民身份与早期自由主义女性主义 / Reason, education, citizenship, early liberal feminism
inherit: 继承启蒙理性、自然权利与共和公民教育传统。 / Inherits Enlightenment reason, natural rights, and republican civic education.
critique: 批判把女性训练成取悦男性的装饰性存在。 / Critiques the training of women as ornamental beings made for male approval.
transform: 把“理性的人”转化为“女性也应成为理性公民”。 / Transforms the rational human subject into women as rational citizens.
propose: 提出以教育、经济能力和公民责任作为女性自由的基础。 / Proposes education, economic capacity, and civic responsibility as foundations of women's freedom.

name: Frida Kahlo
keyWorks: 《带刺项链和蜂鸟的自画像 / Self-Portrait with Thorn Necklace and Hummingbird》（1940）
《亨利·福特医院 / Henry Ford Hospital》（1932）
shortBioZh: 以自画像、身体经验、疼痛、民族身份与亲密关系为线索，呈现女性主体经验的复杂性。
shortBioEn: Her self-portraits connect bodily pain, national identity, intimacy, and female subjectivity.

name: Claude Cahun
keyWorks: 《I am in training, don’t kiss me》（1927）
反纳粹抵抗传单与摄影实践 / Anti-Nazi resistance leaflets and photographic practice
shortBioZh: 通过摄影、自我造型与性别表演挑战固定身份，是理解酷儿影像与自我凝视的重要节点。
shortBioEn: Cahun used photography, styling, and performance to question fixed identity and gender norms.

name: Simone de Beauvoir
keyWorks: 《一个规矩女孩的回忆 / Memoirs of a Dutiful Daughter》（1958）
shortBioZh: 存在主义性别分析影响第二波女性主义，也开启“女性如何被社会建构”的核心讨论。
shortBioEn: Her existential analysis of gender shaped second-wave feminism and debates on social construction.
theoryFramework:
focus: 存在主义、身体经验与“成为女人” / Existentialism, embodiment, and becoming woman
inherit: 继承存在主义、现象学与自由伦理。 / Inherits existentialism, phenomenology, and an ethics of freedom.
critique: 批判把女性固定为自然、他者和附属对象的父权神话。 / Critiques patriarchal myths that fix woman as nature, Other, and dependent object.
transform: 把性别从生物事实转化为历史和社会生成过程。 / Transforms gender from biological fact into a historical and social process.
propose: 提出女性通过劳动、行动和互相承认争取主体自由。 / Proposes freedom through work, action, and reciprocal recognition.

name: Yoko Ono
locationName: 京都 / 纽约, 日本 / 美国
shortBioZh: 观众剪去表演者衣物的行为艺术作品，将身体、观看、暴力与脆弱性置于现场。
shortBioEn: This performance placed the body, spectatorship, violence, and vulnerability into a live encounter.

name: Judy Chicago
shortBioZh: 以大型装置重写女性历史与艺术史中的缺席，强调记忆、档案与女性谱系。
shortBioEn: Her installations rewrite absences in art history through memory, archives, and women’s genealogies.

name: Audre Lorde
keyWorks: 《Zami: A New Spelling of My Name》（1982）
shortBioZh: 她的诗歌与散文强调差异、种族、性、疾病经验与女性主义政治之间的关系。
shortBioEn: Lorde’s poetry and essays connect difference, race, sexuality, illness, and feminist politics.
theoryFramework:
focus: 差异、愤怒、黑人女同性恋女性主义 / Difference, anger, Black lesbian feminism
inherit: 继承黑人解放、诗性表达、女同性恋女性主义与反殖民政治。 / Inherits Black liberation, poetic knowledge, lesbian feminism, and anti-colonial politics.
critique: 批判白人中产女性主义把差异当作威胁或附属议题。 / Critiques white middle-class feminism for treating difference as threat or appendix.
transform: 把愤怒、欲望和身体经验转化为知识与政治能量。 / Transforms anger, erotic power, and embodied experience into knowledge and political energy.
propose: 提出以差异为资源的联盟、语言行动和自我命名。 / Proposes coalitions built from difference, speech as action, and self-naming.

name: Nan Goldin
shortBioZh: 以亲密关系、酷儿社群、欲望与创伤为题，构成私人影像与社会现实之间的张力。
shortBioEn: Goldin’s work frames intimacy, queer communities, desire, and trauma as both personal and social history.

name: Guerrilla Girls
keyWorks: 《Do women have to be naked to get into the Met. Museum?》（1989）
《The Advantages of Being a Woman Artist》（1988）
《The Guerrilla Girls’ Bedside Companion to the History of Western Art》（1998）
海报、公共项目与统计行动 / Posters, public interventions, and data activism
shortBioZh: 匿名艺术家集体用海报、数据和幽默批判美术馆、市场与艺术史中的性别/种族不平等。
shortBioEn: This anonymous collective uses posters, data, and humor to critique gendered and racial exclusion in art institutions.

name: Chandra Talpade Mohanty
keyWorks: 《Third World Women and the Politics of Feminism》（1991，与 Ann Russo、Lourdes Torres 编）
《Feminist Genealogies, Colonial Legacies, Democratic Futures》（1997，与 M. Jacqui Alexander 编）
shortBioZh: 批判将“第三世界女性”同质化的西方中心叙事，强调位置、历史与跨国资本主义。
shortBioEn: Mohanty critiques Western-centered narratives that homogenize “Third World women,” emphasizing location, history, and transnational capitalism.
theoryFramework:
focus: 后殖民女性主义、位置性与跨国团结 / Postcolonial feminism, location, transnational solidarity
inherit: 继承反殖民理论、马克思主义女性主义和第三世界女性主义。 / Inherits anti-colonial theory, Marxist feminism, and Third World feminism.
critique: 批判西方女性主义把“第三世界女性”同质化为受害者。 / Critiques Western feminism's homogenizing figure of the victimized Third World woman.
transform: 把普遍女性经验转化为有历史、阶级、民族和地域差异的位置分析。 / Transforms universal womanhood into historically located analysis of class, nation, and place.
propose: 提出反资本主义、跨国且基于共同斗争的女性主义团结。 / Proposes anti-capitalist transnational solidarity grounded in shared struggle.

name: Judith Butler
keyWorks: 《Notes Toward a Performative Theory of Assembly》（2015）
shortBioZh: “性别操演”推动酷儿理论与女性主义关于身份、规范和身体的重新思考。
shortBioEn: Butler’s theory of performativity reshaped feminist and queer debates on identity, norms, and embodiment.
theoryFramework:
focus: 性别操演、规范与酷儿理论 / Gender performativity, norms, queer theory
inherit: 继承后结构主义、福柯式权力分析、精神分析和女性主义争论。 / Inherits poststructuralism, Foucauldian power analysis, psychoanalysis, and feminist debates.
critique: 批判把 sex/gender、女性主体或异性恋秩序当作自然前提。 / Critiques naturalized sex/gender, stable womanhood, and heterosexual order.
transform: 把身份转化为规范反复生产的效果，而非先验本质。 / Transforms identity into an effect of repeated norms rather than prior essence.
propose: 提出通过重复中的偏差、联盟和身体集会扰动规范。 / Proposes troubling norms through citational variation, coalition, and embodied assembly.

name: Cindy Sherman
shortBioZh: 通过扮演与自拍式摄影拆解电影、广告与艺术史中被制造的女性形象。
shortBioEn: Sherman uses staged self-representation to deconstruct feminine stereotypes in cinema, advertising, and art history.

name: Yayoi Kusama
keyWorks: 《Infinity Mirror Rooms》系列 / Infinity Mirror Rooms series
shortBioZh: 以波点、镜屋和沉浸式装置建构身体、重复、精神经验与观看机制。
shortBioEn: Kusama’s dots, mirror rooms, and immersive installations connect body, repetition, psychic experience, and spectatorship.

name: Shirin Neshat
locationName: 纽约 / 德黑兰, 伊朗 / 美国
keyWorks: 《Women of Allah》系列 / Women of Allah series（1993–1997）
shortBioZh: 以摄影和影像装置处理流亡、宗教、女性身体、书写与政治凝视。
shortBioEn: Neshat’s photography and video installations address exile, religion, women’s bodies, writing, and political spectatorship.

name: Zanele Muholi
keyWorks: 《Faces and Phases》系列 / Faces and Phases series
shortBioZh: 以黑人酷儿与跨性别社群肖像为核心，将摄影作为档案、见证与行动主义。
shortBioEn: Muholi photographs Black LGBTQIA+ communities, treating images as archive, testimony, and activism.

name: Sara Ahmed
shortBioZh: 从日常经验、情感、制度与投诉出发，讨论女性主义如何成为一种生活实践。
shortBioEn: Ahmed writes from everyday experience, affect, institutions, and complaint to understand feminism as lived practice.
theoryFramework:
focus: 情感政治、制度批判与女性主义生活 / Affect, institutions, feminist life
inherit: 继承现象学、酷儿理论、后殖民女性主义和情感研究。 / Inherits phenomenology, queer theory, postcolonial feminism, and affect studies.
critique: 批判幸福、包容和多元口号如何遮蔽制度性暴力。 / Critiques how happiness, inclusion, and diversity slogans can hide institutional violence.
transform: 把日常不适、投诉和拒绝转化为认识制度的路径。 / Transforms discomfort, complaint, and refusal into ways of knowing institutions.
propose: 提出“女性主义生活”作为持续实践、支持网络和生存工具箱。 / Proposes feminist life as ongoing practice, support networks, and a survival kit.

name: Julia Kristeva
shortBioZh: Julia Kristeva 将语言、身体、母性、卑贱与主体生成联系起来，是法国理论、精神分析女性主义与文学批评的重要节点。
shortBioEn: Kristeva connects language, body, maternity, abjection, and subject formation across French theory, psychoanalytic feminism, and literary criticism.
theoryFramework:
focus: 符号界、母性、卑贱与主体生成 / Semiotic, maternity, abjection, subject formation
inherit: 继承精神分析、结构主义语言学、符号学和文学先锋传统。 / Inherits psychoanalysis, structural linguistics, semiotics, and avant-garde literature.
critique: 批判只重秩序和父权象征法则的语言观。 / Critiques language theories centered only on order and paternal symbolic law.
transform: 把身体节奏、母性和卑贱经验转化为主体生成的动力。 / Transforms bodily rhythm, maternity, and abjection into forces of subject formation.
propose: 提出在诗性语言和边界经验中理解主体、欲望与文化。 / Proposes reading subjectivity, desire, and culture through poetic language and boundary experiences.

name: Hélène Cixous
keyWorks: 《Three Steps on the Ladder of Writing》（1993）
《Portrait of Jacques Derrida as a Young Jewish Saint》（2001）
shortBioZh: Hélène Cixous 以“女性书写”挑战父权语言结构，强调身体、欲望、声音与文本形式的解放。
shortBioEn: Cixous’s écriture féminine challenges patriarchal language through body, desire, voice, and experimental textual form.
theoryFramework:
focus: 女性书写、身体与父权语言批判 / Ecriture feminine, body, patriarchal language
inherit: 继承解构、精神分析、现代主义文学和法国女性主义。 / Inherits deconstruction, psychoanalysis, modernist literature, and French feminism.
critique: 批判二元对立和父权语言把女性排除在写作主体之外。 / Critiques binary oppositions and patriarchal language that exclude women as writing subjects.
transform: 把身体、欲望和声音转化为实验性写作力量。 / Transforms body, desire, and voice into experimental writing force.
propose: 提出女性书写，鼓励女性书写身体、梦和未被允许的经验。 / Proposes ecriture feminine: writing the body, dreams, and forbidden experience.

name: Laura Mulvey
shortBioZh: Laura Mulvey 的女性主义电影理论提出“男性凝视”问题，分析经典电影如何组织观看、欲望与女性形象。
shortBioEn: Mulvey’s feminist film theory introduced the problem of the “male gaze,” analyzing how classical cinema organizes looking, desire, and images of women.
theoryFramework:
focus: 男性凝视、精神分析电影理论 / Male gaze, psychoanalytic film theory
inherit: 继承弗洛伊德、拉康精神分析和电影叙事理论。 / Inherits Freud, Lacan, psychoanalysis, and film narrative theory.
critique: 批判经典电影把男性设为主动观看者、女性设为被观看对象。 / Critiques classical cinema for coding men as active lookers and women as displayed objects.
transform: 把电影快感转化为可被分析的权力结构。 / Transforms cinematic pleasure into an analyzable structure of power.
propose: 提出破坏叙事快感和视觉秩序的女性主义电影实践。 / Proposes feminist film practice that disrupts narrative pleasure and visual order.

name: Monique Wittig
shortBioZh: Monique Wittig 批判异性恋制度如何制造“女人”这一政治类别，是女同性恋女性主义与酷儿理论的重要先声。
shortBioEn: Wittig critiques heterosexuality as a political regime that produces “woman” as a category, becoming a key precursor to lesbian feminism and queer theory.
theoryFramework:
focus: 异性恋制度、语言与女同性恋唯物主义 / Heterosexual regime, language, lesbian materialism
inherit: 继承唯物主义女性主义、文学实验和女同性恋政治。 / Inherits materialist feminism, literary experiment, and lesbian politics.
critique: 批判异性恋制度把“女人”制造成被支配的政治类别。 / Critiques heterosexuality as a regime producing woman as a dominated political category.
transform: 把性别从身份转化为阶级关系和语言制度。 / Transforms gender from identity into class relation and linguistic regime.
propose: 提出通过女同性恋主体、语言改造和类别拒绝打破性别制度。 / Proposes lesbian subjectivity, linguistic transformation, and refusal of imposed categories.

name: Marguerite Duras
locationName: 巴黎 / 西贡, 法国 / 越南
shortBioZh: Marguerite Duras 的小说与电影处理欲望、记忆、殖民关系和女性叙事声音，可作为文学与后殖民女性经验的节点。
shortBioEn: Duras’s fiction and cinema explore desire, memory, colonial relations, and women’s narrative voice.
theoryFramework:
focus: 欲望、殖民记忆与女性叙事声音 / Desire, colonial memory, feminine narration
inherit: 继承现代主义叙事、法国文学、电影语言和殖民记忆书写。 / Inherits modernist narrative, French literature, cinema, and writing of colonial memory.
critique: 批判稳定自传、殖民权力和规范化女性欲望的叙述。 / Critiques stable autobiography, colonial power, and normalized stories of female desire.
transform: 把断裂记忆、沉默和欲望转化为女性叙事形式。 / Transforms fractured memory, silence, and desire into feminine narrative form.
propose: 提出以暧昧、重复和空白书写主体与殖民关系。 / Proposes ambiguity, repetition, and gaps as ways to write subjectivity and colonial relations.

name: Luce Irigaray
shortBioZh: Luce Irigaray 从哲学、语言和精神分析出发批判男性中心主体，提出性差异伦理与女性主体问题。
shortBioEn: Irigaray critiques phallocentric subjectivity through philosophy, language, and psychoanalysis, developing an ethics of sexual difference.
detailImageCredit: Bilingual theoretical framework generated from course readings / 基于课程阅读生成的双语理论框架图
theoryFramework:
focus: 性差异、女性主体与精神分析批判 / Sexual difference, female subjectivity, psychoanalytic critique
inherit: 继承哲学史、精神分析、语言理论和法国女性主义。 / Inherits philosophy, psychoanalysis, language theory, and French feminism.
critique: 批判男性中心主体把女性定义为镜像、缺失或他者。 / Critiques phallocentric subjectivity that defines women as mirror, lack, or other.
transform: 把“缺失的女性”转化为具有自身欲望和伦理关系的主体。 / Transforms absent woman into a subject of desire and ethical relation.
propose: 提出性差异伦理、女性谱系和新的爱与语言关系。 / Proposes ethics of sexual difference, female genealogy, and new relations of love and language.

name: Rosi Braidotti
shortBioZh: Rosi Braidotti 将女性主义、后结构主义与后人类思想结合，提出游牧主体、生成与关系性主体。
shortBioEn: Braidotti links feminism, poststructuralism, and posthuman thought through nomadic subjectivity, becoming, and relational embodiment.
theoryFramework:
focus: 游牧主体、生成与后人类女性主义 / Nomadic subject, becoming, posthuman feminism
inherit: 继承后结构主义、德勒兹哲学、女性主义和欧洲大陆理论。 / Inherits poststructuralism, Deleuzian philosophy, feminism, and continental theory.
critique: 批判固定身份、人文主义普遍主体和欧洲中心知识。 / Critiques fixed identity, humanist universal subject, and Eurocentric knowledge.
transform: 把主体转化为流动、多重、关系性的生成过程。 / Transforms subjectivity into mobile, multiple, relational becoming.
propose: 提出游牧主体与后人类女性主义，用关系性伦理思考差异。 / Proposes nomadic subjectivity and posthuman feminism through relational ethics of difference.

name: Adrienne Rich
shortBioZh: Adrienne Rich 连接诗歌、母性政治、女同性恋存在与知识生产，是美国女性主义写作的关键人物。
shortBioEn: Rich connects poetry, motherhood politics, lesbian existence, and knowledge production in feminist writing.
theoryFramework:
focus: 母性政治、强制异性恋与女性诗学 / Motherhood, compulsory heterosexuality, feminist poetics
inherit: 继承女性诗歌、激进女性主义和女同性恋女性主义。 / Inherits women's poetry, radical feminism, and lesbian feminism.
critique: 批判母性制度、异性恋强制和男性文学传统。 / Critiques the institution of motherhood, compulsory heterosexuality, and male literary tradition.
transform: 把个人经验、母职矛盾和诗歌转化为政治分析。 / Transforms personal experience, maternal contradiction, and poetry into political analysis.
propose: 提出女性连续体、重新命名经验和女性知识谱系。 / Proposes lesbian continuum, renaming experience, and women's knowledge genealogies.

name: Gloria Anzaldúa
locationName: 德州边境, 美国 / 墨西哥
keyWorks: 《Light in the Dark/Luz en lo Oscuro》（2015）
shortBioZh: Gloria Anzaldúa 以边境经验、语言混杂和“新梅斯蒂萨意识”重写种族、性别、性向与殖民边界。
shortBioEn: Anzaldúa theorizes borderlands, hybrid language, and mestiza consciousness across race, gender, sexuality, and colonial borders.
theoryFramework:
focus: 边界、混杂身份与奇卡纳女性主义 / Borderlands, mestiza consciousness, Chicana feminism
inherit: 继承奇卡纳运动、原住民/墨西哥文化、酷儿女性主义和后殖民理论。 / Inherits Chicana movements, Indigenous/Mexican cultures, queer feminism, and postcolonial theory.
critique: 批判国界、语言纯粹性、种族主义和性别/性向规范。 / Critiques borders, linguistic purity, racism, and gender/sexual norms.
transform: 把边境创伤和混杂语言转化为新梅斯蒂萨意识。 / Transforms border wounds and hybrid language into mestiza consciousness.
propose: 提出跨界、双语、多重身份的知识和联盟方式。 / Proposes border-crossing, bilingual, multiple-identity knowledge and coalition.

name: Jack Halberstam
locationName: 纽约 / 洛杉矶, 美国
shortBioZh: Jack Halberstam 的研究连接跨性别研究、酷儿时间、失败美学与流行文化，扩展了女性主义的性别理论边界。
shortBioEn: Halberstam links trans studies, queer temporality, failure, and popular culture, expanding feminist gender theory.
theoryFramework:
focus: 女性男性气质、酷儿时间与失败美学 / Female masculinity, queer time, failure
inherit: 继承酷儿理论、跨性别研究、文化研究和女性主义性别理论。 / Inherits queer theory, trans studies, cultural studies, and feminist gender theory.
critique: 批判把男性气质归为男性所有、把成功归为规范人生路线。 / Critiques masculinity as male property and success as normative life trajectory.
transform: 把失败、亚文化和非规范时间转化为知识资源。 / Transforms failure, subculture, and non-normative time into knowledge resources.
propose: 提出以酷儿时间、低理论和非规范身体重想性别。 / Proposes queer time, low theory, and non-normative embodiment to rethink gender.

name: bell hooks
shortBioZh: bell hooks 从种族、阶级、性别、教育和爱的政治出发，推动“从边缘到中心”的女性主义理论。
shortBioEn: bell hooks writes from race, class, gender, pedagogy, and love to move feminist theory from margin to center.
theoryFramework:
focus: 黑人女性主义、边缘视角、爱与教育 / Black feminism, margin, love, pedagogy
inherit: 继承黑人女性思想、民权运动、教育实践和社会主义女性主义。 / Inherits Black women's thought, civil rights struggle, pedagogy, and socialist feminism.
critique: 批判白人女性主义、资本主义父权和种族/阶级盲点。 / Critiques white feminism, capitalist patriarchy, and race/class blindness.
transform: 把边缘位置转化为批判中心和教育实践。 / Transforms the margin into a critical location and pedagogical practice.
propose: 提出从边缘到中心的交叉女性主义、爱与解放教育。 / Proposes intersectional feminism from margin to center, love, and liberatory education.

name: Angela Davis
shortBioZh: Angela Davis 将黑人女性主义、马克思主义、反监狱运动和跨国解放政治联系起来。
shortBioEn: Davis connects Black feminism, Marxism, prison abolition, and transnational liberation politics.
theoryFramework:
focus: 种族、阶级、性别与废除主义 / Race, class, gender, abolition
inherit: 继承黑人激进传统、马克思主义、反监狱运动和女性主义。 / Inherits Black radicalism, Marxism, abolitionism, and feminism.
critique: 批判把女性压迫与种族、阶级、监狱和劳动剥削分开讨论。 / Critiques separating women's oppression from race, class, prisons, and labor exploitation.
transform: 把女性主义转化为反资本主义、反种族主义和废除主义政治。 / Transforms feminism into anti-capitalist, anti-racist, abolitionist politics.
propose: 提出以联盟、集体自由和制度废除理解解放。 / Proposes liberation through coalition, collective freedom, and institutional abolition.

name: Betty Friedan
keyWorks: 美国全国妇女组织 NOW 共同创办 / Co-founded NOW（1966）
shortBioZh: Betty Friedan 批判中产家庭主妇理想中的压抑与不满足，成为美国第二波自由主义女性主义的重要节点。
shortBioEn: Friedan critiques the suburban housewife ideal and became a key node of U.S. second-wave liberal feminism.
theoryFramework:
focus: 家庭神话、自由主义女性主义与公共平等 / Domestic myth, liberal feminism, public equality
inherit: 继承自由主义平等、公民权利和战后美国社会批判。 / Inherits liberal equality, civil rights language, and postwar U.S. social critique.
critique: 批判郊区家庭主妇理想掩盖女性的不满足和能力浪费。 / Critiques the suburban housewife ideal for hiding women's dissatisfaction and wasted capacities.
transform: 把私人焦虑转化为结构性社会问题。 / Transforms private malaise into a structural social problem.
propose: 提出教育、工作、法律平等和公共参与作为女性解放路径。 / Proposes education, work, legal equality, and public participation as paths to liberation.

name: Naomi Wolf
shortBioZh: Naomi Wolf 讨论美貌标准如何作为社会规训机制作用于女性身体与劳动。
shortBioEn: Wolf examines beauty standards as social discipline acting on women’s bodies and work.
theoryFramework:
focus: 美貌神话、身体规训与媒体文化 / Beauty myth, bodily discipline, media culture
inherit: 继承第二波女性主义、身体政治和媒体批判。 / Inherits second-wave feminism, body politics, and media critique.
critique: 批判美貌标准在女性获得公共权利后继续制造规训。 / Critiques beauty standards as discipline that persists after women gain public rights.
transform: 把美容、饮食和年龄焦虑转化为政治经济分析。 / Transforms beauty, dieting, and age anxiety into political-economic analysis.
propose: 提出识别并拒绝身体规训，重建女性公共能量。 / Proposes recognizing and refusing bodily discipline to reclaim women's public energy.

name: Robin Morgan
shortBioZh: Robin Morgan 通过文集、诗歌与行动主义推动激进女性主义和全球女性主义网络。
shortBioEn: Morgan’s anthologies, poetry, and activism helped shape radical feminism and global feminist networks.
theoryFramework:
focus: 姐妹情谊、激进女性主义与全球文集 / Sisterhood, radical feminism, global anthologies
inherit: 继承新左派、反战运动、诗歌和激进女性主义组织。 / Inherits New Left activism, antiwar politics, poetry, and radical feminist organizing.
critique: 批判男性左翼、父权暴力和女性声音在公共知识中的缺席。 / Critiques male-dominated left politics, patriarchal violence, and women's exclusion from public knowledge.
transform: 把文集和见证转化为运动网络与知识档案。 / Transforms anthologies and testimony into movement networks and archives.
propose: 提出姐妹情谊作为跨地域女性主义组织和教育形式。 / Proposes sisterhood as a form of translocal feminist organizing and education.

name: Sandra Gilbert & Susan Gubar
keyWorks: 《The Norton Anthology of Literature by Women》（1985，编）
shortBioZh: Sandra Gilbert 与 Susan Gubar 通过女性主义文学批评重读19世纪女性写作，提出“阁楼上的疯女人”等关键意象。
shortBioEn: Gilbert and Gubar reread nineteenth-century women’s writing through feminist literary criticism, developing the influential figure of the “madwoman.”
imageCredit: Archive image via Wikimedia Commons; duo node uses available profile image
theoryFramework:
focus: 女性主义文学批评与女性作者谱系 / Feminist literary criticism and women writers' genealogy
inherit: 继承英美文学批评、女性写作传统和精神分析意象分析。 / Inherits Anglo-American literary criticism, women's writing, and psychoanalytic imagery.
critique: 批判男性文学经典把女性作者困在天使/疯女人二分中。 / Critiques male literary canon for trapping women writers in angel/madwoman binaries.
transform: 把19世纪女性小说转化为抵抗、焦虑和创造的文本地图。 / Transforms nineteenth-century women's fiction into a map of resistance, anxiety, and creation.
propose: 提出重读女性经典、建立女性文学谱系和课程 canon。 / Proposes rereading women writers and building feminist literary genealogy and curriculum.

name: Chimamanda Ngozi Adichie
locationName: 拉各斯 / 恩苏卡, 尼日利亚
shortBioZh: Chimamanda Ngozi Adichie 将文学、演讲与大众传播结合，使女性主义进入更广泛的公共文化讨论。
shortBioEn: Adichie connects literature, public speech, and popular culture to bring feminism to wider audiences.
theoryFramework:
focus: 大众女性主义、非洲叙事与公共演讲 / Popular feminism, African narrative, public speech
inherit: 继承非洲文学、后殖民叙事、公共演讲和自由主义平等话语。 / Inherits African literature, postcolonial narrative, public speech, and liberal equality discourse.
critique: 批判把女性主义污名化、把性别不平等正常化的日常文化。 / Critiques stigma around feminism and everyday normalization of gender inequality.
transform: 把小说和演讲转化为可进入大众文化的女性主义教育。 / Transforms fiction and speeches into accessible feminist public pedagogy.
propose: 提出日常教育男孩女孩、重写性别期待的平等实践。 / Proposes everyday education of boys and girls and rewriting gender expectations.

name: Marilyn Frye
keyWorks: 女性主义哲学与分离主义论文 / feminist philosophy essays
shortBioZh: Marilyn Frye 以“鸟笼”隐喻解释压迫并非单一障碍，而是多重结构共同限制行动。
shortBioEn: Frye’s birdcage metaphor explains oppression as a structure of interlocking barriers rather than a single obstacle.
theoryFramework:
focus: 压迫结构、鸟笼隐喻与女性主义哲学 / Oppression, birdcage metaphor, feminist philosophy
inherit: 继承分析哲学、激进女性主义和社会结构分析。 / Inherits analytic philosophy, radical feminism, and structural social analysis.
critique: 批判把压迫理解为单个事件或个人偏见。 / Critiques understanding oppression as isolated events or individual prejudice.
transform: 把日常限制转化为互相连接的结构图像。 / Transforms everyday constraints into an image of interlocking structure.
propose: 提出从整体结构看压迫，并区分束缚、选择和权力。 / Proposes seeing oppression structurally and distinguishing constraint, choice, and power.

name: Caroline Criado Perez
keyWorks: 女性纸币运动 / Women on Banknotes campaign
数据性别差距公共写作 / public writing on gender data gaps
shortBioZh: Caroline Criado Perez 聚焦性别数据缺口，展示城市、医学、劳动与技术系统如何默认男性身体与生活模式。
shortBioEn: Criado Perez highlights gender data gaps in cities, medicine, work, and technology systems that often default to male bodies and lives.
theoryFramework:
focus: 性别数据缺口、设计偏见与隐形女性 / Gender data gap, design bias, invisible women
inherit: 继承自由主义平等、数据新闻、公共政策和技术批判。 / Inherits liberal equality, data journalism, public policy, and technology critique.
critique: 批判城市、医学、劳动和技术系统默认男性身体与生活。 / Critiques systems in cities, medicine, work, and tech that default to male bodies and lives.
transform: 把缺失数据转化为可见的不平等证据。 / Transforms missing data into visible evidence of inequality.
propose: 提出性别敏感的数据收集、设计和政策评估。 / Proposes gender-sensitive data collection, design, and policy evaluation.

name: Lola Olufemi
keyWorks: 《A FLY Girl’s Guide to University》（2019，合著）
废除主义与黑人女性主义写作 / abolitionist and Black feminist writing
shortBioZh: Lola Olufemi 从黑人女性主义、废除主义和集体想象出发，反对将女性主义简化为个人赋权叙事。
shortBioEn: Olufemi writes from Black feminism, abolitionism, and collective imagination against individualised empowerment narratives.
theoryFramework:
focus: 废除想象、黑人女性主义与反个人赋权 / Abolitionist imagination, Black feminism, anti-individual empowerment
inherit: 继承黑人女性主义、废除主义、学生运动和反资本主义政治。 / Inherits Black feminism, abolitionism, student activism, and anti-capitalist politics.
critique: 批判把女性主义简化为个人成功、品牌口号或温和改革。 / Critiques feminism reduced to individual success, branding, or mild reform.
transform: 把想象、实验和集体写作转化为政治方法。 / Transforms imagination, experiment, and collective writing into political method.
propose: 提出废除性、集体性和未来导向的女性主义实践。 / Proposes abolitionist, collective, future-oriented feminist practice.

name: Laura Bates
shortBioZh: Laura Bates 通过 Everyday Sexism Project 收集日常性别歧视叙事，将数字档案转化为教育与公共行动。
shortBioEn: Bates’s Everyday Sexism Project turns digital testimony into public education and feminist action.
theoryFramework:
focus: 日常性别歧视、数字见证与公共教育 / Everyday sexism, digital testimony, public education
inherit: 继承自由主义女性主义、反性暴力运动和数字行动主义。 / Inherits liberal feminism, anti-sexual violence activism, and digital activism.
critique: 批判把性骚扰、厌女玩笑和日常歧视视为小事。 / Critiques treating harassment, misogynist jokes, and everyday discrimination as trivial.
transform: 把个人故事转化为数字档案和公共证据。 / Transforms personal stories into a digital archive and public evidence.
propose: 提出通过见证、教育和媒体行动改变性别文化。 / Proposes changing gender culture through testimony, education, and media action.

name: Silvia Federici
locationName: 纽约 / 意大利, 美国 / 意大利
shortBioZh: Silvia Federici 将资本主义、猎巫、殖民、家务劳动和社会再生产联系起来，是马克思主义女性主义的重要思想家。
shortBioEn: Federici links capitalism, witch hunts, colonialism, housework, and social reproduction in Marxist feminist theory.
theoryFramework:
focus: 再生产劳动、家务工资与资本主义批判 / Reproductive labor, wages for housework, capitalism
inherit: 继承马克思主义、自治主义、家务工资运动和女性主义劳动理论。 / Inherits Marxism, autonomism, Wages for Housework, and feminist labor theory.
critique: 批判资本主义把家务和照护劳动自然化为女性义务。 / Critiques capitalism for naturalizing housework and care as women's unpaid duty.
transform: 把家庭、身体和猎巫史转化为资本积累分析。 / Transforms home, body, and witch-hunt history into analysis of accumulation.
propose: 提出承认再生产劳动、共同体资源和反资本主义女性主义。 / Proposes recognition of reproductive labor, commons, and anti-capitalist feminism.

name: Alia Al-Saji
keyWorks: 关于面纱与种族化视觉的论文 / essays on veiling and racialized vision
关于柏格森、感知与情感的论文 / work on Bergson, perception and affect
现象学女性主义写作 / feminist phenomenology
shortBioZh: Alia Al-Saji 从现象学与后殖民女性主义出发，分析视觉、种族化、面纱、身体和时间性。
shortBioEn: Al-Saji analyzes vision, racialization, veiling, embodiment, and temporality through phenomenology and postcolonial feminism.
theoryFramework:
focus: 种族化感知、面纱、时间性与现象学 / Racialized perception, veiling, temporality, phenomenology
inherit: 继承现象学、柏格森、后殖民女性主义和种族批判。 / Inherits phenomenology, Bergson, postcolonial feminism, and race critique.
critique: 批判把穆斯林女性面纱作为落后、沉默或可拯救对象的视觉框架。 / Critiques visual frames that cast veiled Muslim women as backward, silent, or needing rescue.
transform: 把迟疑、感知和时间性转化为反种族化的分析工具。 / Transforms hesitation, perception, and temporality into tools against racialization.
propose: 提出通过改变观看习惯和时间感来抵抗种族化感知。 / Proposes resisting racialized perception by altering habits of seeing and temporality.

name: Irene Watson
locationName: 阿德莱德, 澳大利亚
keyWorks: 《Raw Law: The Coming of the Muldarbi and the Path to Its Demise》（2009）
原住民法律与主权论文 / essays on Indigenous law and sovereignty
First Nations knowledge and legal critique
shortBioZh: Irene Watson 从原住民法律、土地、主权和殖民批判出发，挑战殖民法体系对原住民生命世界的规训。
shortBioEn: Watson writes from Indigenous law, land, sovereignty, and anti-colonial critique against colonial legal orders.
theoryFramework:
focus: 原住民主权、土地法与殖民法律批判 / Indigenous sovereignty, land law, colonial legal critique
inherit: 继承原住民法律、反殖民理论、土地知识和国际法批判。 / Inherits Indigenous law, anti-colonial theory, land knowledge, and critique of international law.
critique: 批判殖民法把原住民土地、生命和知识纳入外来主权。 / Critiques colonial law for subsuming Indigenous land, life, and knowledge under imposed sovereignty.
transform: 把法律从国家规则转化为与土地、祖先和责任相连的生活法。 / Transforms law from state rule into living law tied to land, ancestors, and responsibility.
propose: 提出以原住民主权、Raw Law 和土地关系重想正义。 / Proposes Indigenous sovereignty, Raw Law, and land relations as bases for justice.

name: Celeste Liddle
keyWorks: 《The Black Woman and the Green Dress》（2022）
公共评论与专栏写作 / public commentary and columns
原住民女性主义行动 / Indigenous feminist activism
工会与反种族主义写作 / union and anti-racist writing
shortBioZh: Celeste Liddle 以澳大利亚原住民女性主义视角书写种族、性别、殖民暴力、劳动与公共文化。
shortBioEn: Liddle writes from an Aboriginal feminist perspective on race, gender, colonial violence, labor, and public culture.
theoryFramework:
focus: 原住民女性主义、公共写作与反殖民劳动政治 / Indigenous feminism, public writing, anti-colonial labor politics
inherit: 继承澳大利亚原住民女性行动、工会政治和反种族主义写作。 / Inherits Aboriginal women's activism, union politics, and anti-racist writing.
critique: 批判主流女性主义忽视原住民女性面对的殖民、种族和劳动暴力。 / Critiques mainstream feminism for neglecting colonial, racial, and labor violence against Indigenous women.
transform: 把专栏、演讲和行动转化为公共知识和反殖民教育。 / Transforms columns, speech, and activism into public knowledge and anti-colonial education.
propose: 提出以原住民女性经验为中心的反种族主义女性主义。 / Proposes anti-racist feminism centered on Indigenous women's experience.

name: Ien Ang
shortBioZh: Ien Ang 从离散、身份、媒体受众与亚洲性出发，拓展后殖民女性主义和文化研究的地图。
shortBioEn: Ang’s work on diaspora, identity, media audiences, and Asianness expands postcolonial feminist cultural studies.
theoryFramework:
focus: 离散身份、亚洲性与文化研究 / Diaspora, Asianness, cultural studies
inherit: 继承文化研究、媒体受众研究、后殖民理论和离散研究。 / Inherits cultural studies, audience research, postcolonial theory, and diaspora studies.
critique: 批判固定民族身份、单一中国性和多元文化主义的表面包容。 / Critiques fixed national identity, singular Chineseness, and superficial multicultural inclusion.
transform: 把受众、记忆和离散经验转化为身份政治分析。 / Transforms audience, memory, and diaspora into analysis of identity politics.
propose: 提出以混杂、位置性和媒体文化理解亚洲女性经验。 / Proposes hybridity, positionality, and media culture for understanding Asian women's experience.

name: Jackie Huggins
locationName: 布里斯班, 澳大利亚
keyWorks: 原住民女性历史写作 / writing on Aboriginal women’s history
和解、记忆与公共历史工作 / reconciliation and public history work
shortBioZh: Jackie Huggins 通过历史、回忆录和公共行动书写澳大利亚原住民女性经验、记忆与殖民创伤。
shortBioEn: Huggins writes Aboriginal women’s experience, memory, and colonial trauma through history, memoir, and public activism.
theoryFramework:
focus: 原住民女性历史、记忆与公共史 / Aboriginal women's history, memory, public history
inherit: 继承口述史、原住民女性知识、家庭记忆和反殖民历史写作。 / Inherits oral history, Aboriginal women's knowledge, family memory, and anti-colonial historiography.
critique: 批判国家历史和白人女性主义对原住民女性经验的抹除。 / Critiques national history and white feminism for erasing Aboriginal women's experience.
transform: 把母女记忆和生活故事转化为历史证词。 / Transforms mother-daughter memory and life story into historical testimony.
propose: 提出以原住民女性声音重写澳大利亚历史和和解议题。 / Proposes rewriting Australian history and reconciliation through Aboriginal women's voices.

name: Raewyn Connell
shortBioZh: Raewyn Connell 以性别秩序、霸权男性气质和南方理论影响性别研究、男性气质研究与全球知识政治。
shortBioEn: Connell’s work on gender order, hegemonic masculinity, and Southern theory shaped gender studies and global knowledge politics.
theoryFramework:
focus: 性别秩序、霸权男性气质与南方理论 / Gender order, hegemonic masculinity, Southern theory
inherit: 继承社会学、马克思主义、性别角色批判和全球知识政治。 / Inherits sociology, Marxism, gender-role critique, and global knowledge politics.
critique: 批判把性别看作个人角色，也批判北方理论的普遍主义。 / Critiques gender as mere individual role and Northern theory's universalism.
transform: 把性别转化为制度化权力关系和全球知识结构。 / Transforms gender into institutional power relations and global knowledge structure.
propose: 提出性别秩序、霸权男性气质和南方理论来分析全球性别。 / Proposes gender order, hegemonic masculinity, and Southern theory for global gender analysis.
